name: Do-Hyeong Lee
education: B.S., Department of Electrical Engineering, Hanyang University, Ansan, Korea (2020.03 ~ 2026.02)
biography: Do-Hyeong Lee received a B.S. degree in the school of electrical engineering at Hanyang University, Ansan, South Korea. His research interests include analog and digital circuit designs of clock and data recovery (CDR).

name: Suk-Min Yoon
biography: Suk-Min Yoon received a B.S. degree in electrical engineering from Yeungnam University, Gyeongsan, South Korea. His research interests include analog and digital circuit designs of Processing In Memory(PIM).

name: Han-Gil Yoo
biography: Han-Gil Yoo is pursuing a Bachelor's degree in the school of electrical engineering at Hanyang University, Ansan, South Korea. His research interests include analog and digital circuit designs of processing in memory (PiM).

name: Ju-Yong Lee
biography: Ju-Yong Lee received a B.S. degree in electrical engineering from Gachon University, Sungnam, South Korea. His research interests include Wireline Interface.
